plugins.name: Qwen3 ASR
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Local speech-to-text powered by MLX on Apple Silicon. 30 languages, no API key required.

plugins.name: Linear
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Create Linear issues from transcribed or processed text. Requires a Linear API key.

plugins.name: Webhook Notifications
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Send transcribed or processed text to any webhook URL via HTTP POST.

plugins.name: Groq
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Cloud transcription and LLM via Groq API. Fast inference, requires API key.

plugins.name: OpenAI
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Cloud transcription and LLM via OpenAI API. Whisper and GPT models, requires API key.

plugins.name: Gemini
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: LLM provider via Google Gemini API. Requires API key.

plugins.name: WhisperKit
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Local speech-to-text powered by WhisperKit. 7 model sizes, 99 languages, streaming support.

plugins.name: Parakeet
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: Local speech-to-text powered by NVIDIA Parakeet TDT. Fast and accurate, 25 languages.

plugins.name: Apple Speech
plugins.author: TypeWhisper
plugins.description: On-device speech recognition using Apple's Speech framework. Requires macOS 26+, streaming support.
